item.text: {"case_id":"mtj-049","score":1,"pass_criteria_met":false,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":true,"rationale":"The response correctly wakes the approximate-quantified-mapping frame and opens by saying the numbers are only hypothetical, not factual. However, it then calculates 110万 vs 46万 and states a 2.4x exposure conclusion, which violates the criterion to avoid using hypothetical numbers to compute the conclusion. It is partially caveated but over-forces the numeric comparison."}
